info.description: Enterprise-grade accounting, tax, and finance platform
info.title: Azzet API

get.description: Returns all platform admins. SUPER_ADMIN only.

post.description: Create a new platform admin account. SUPER_ADMIN only.

delete.description: Soft-delete an admin account. SUPER_ADMIN only.

patch.description: Update admin role or status. SUPER_ADMIN only.

post.description: Authenticate admin with email + password. If MFA enabled, returns mfa_token for step 2.
Blacklist the admin access token and clear refresh cookie.

get.description: Returns the authenticated admin's profile.

post.description: Confirm MFA setup by providing the first TOTP code from authenticator app. Enables MFA and issues tokens.
Generate TOTP secret and QR code URL. Admin must confirm with first code.
Verify TOTP code after password authentication. Returns access token and sets refresh cookie.
Exchange refresh token (from HttpOnly cookie) for new tokens.

get.description: Returns all invoices across all workspaces. SUPER_ADMIN/ENGINEER only.
Returns all plans including inactive with full features. SUPER_ADMIN/ENGINEER only.

post.description: Create a new plan. SUPER_ADMIN/ENGINEER only.

get.description: Returns a plan with all its features by ID. SUPER_ADMIN/ENGINEER only.

delete.description: Soft-delete a plan (sets is_active = false). SUPER_ADMIN/ENGINEER only.

patch.description: Update an existing plan. SUPER_ADMIN/ENGINEER only.

post.description: Add or update a feature on a plan. SUPER_ADMIN/ENGINEER only.

delete.description: Remove a feature from a plan. SUPER_ADMIN/ENGINEER only.

get.description: Returns all subscriptions across all workspaces. SUPER_ADMIN/ENGINEER only.
Returns all active accounts for the workspace

get.summary: Get General Ledger (Buku Besar) for an account

post.description: Creates a transaction with auto-generated journal entries (SIMPLE mode) or manual entries (ADVANCED mode)
Suggests a category for a transaction based on description. Strict whitelist enforced.

get.description: Returns transaction with journal entries and line items

post.description: Creates a reversal transaction that swaps debit/credit. Original is marked VOID.
Authenticate using email + password. Returns access token in body and refresh token in HttpOnly cookie.
Authenticate using WhatsApp number + OTP code. Request OTP first via /auth/otp/request.
Blacklist the access token and delete the current session. Clears refresh token cookie.
Blacklist the access token and delete ALL sessions for the user. Clears refresh token cookie.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information.

post.description: Send a 6-digit OTP to the user's WhatsApp number via Zenziva. Valid for 5 minutes, max 3 attempts.
Change the authenticated user's password. Requires old password for verification.
Reset password using an OTP code sent to email or WhatsApp. No authentication required.
Exchange refresh token (from HttpOnly cookie) for a new access token + rotated refresh token.
Create a new account with email or whatsapp. Password is always required as fallback.

get.description: Returns all active sessions for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Delete a specific session by ID. The user can only revoke their own sessions.

post.description: Verify an OTP code to activate the user account (email or whatsapp verification).

get.description: Returns all invoices for the current workspace.
Returns invoice detail by ID.

post.description: Initiate payment for an invoice via Xendit. Returns payment URL.

get.description: Returns all payment attempts for the current workspace.
Returns all entities owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new entity (personal or business) linked to the authenticated user.

get.description: Search entities by name. Returns active entities matching the query.
Returns entity detail with meta information.

patch.description: Update an entity's basic information. Only the owner can update.
Update entity administrative/compliance data. Only the owner can update.

get.description: Returns all active plans sorted by tier. Public endpoint (no auth required).
Returns a plan with all its features. Public endpoint (no auth required).
Returns the current active subscription for the workspace.

post.description: Subscribe the current workspace to a plan. Free plans activate instantly. Paid plans with is_trial start a trial.
Cancel the active subscription for the workspace.
Cancel current subscription and subscribe to a new plan.

get.description: Returns all subscriptions (active, expired, cancelled) for the workspace.
Returns quota usage for all tracked features in the current billing period.

post.description: Receives payment status callbacks from Xendit. Verified by x-callback-token header.

get.description: Returns all workspaces the authenticated user has access to.

post.description: Create a workspace from an existing entity. The user becomes PEMILIK (owner).

get.description: Returns all counterparties (PELANGGAN + VENDOR) of the current workspace.

post.description: Add a counterparty (customer/vendor) to workspace. Creates shadow entity if entity_id is not provided.

get.description: Returns all pending (not yet accepted, not expired) invites for the workspace.

post.description: Send an email invitation to join the workspace. User must be registered.
Accept an invite using the token. User must be logged in and email must match.

delete.description: Delete a pending invite before it's accepted.

get.description: Returns all members (PEMILIK + KARYAWAN) of the current workspace.

delete.description: Remove a member from the workspace. Cannot remove the owner.

patch.description: Update a member's role, alias, or status.

get.description: Returns all custom roles for the current workspace.

post.description: Create a new custom role with specific permissions for the workspace.
Assign a workspace role to a member entity.
post.summary: Assign a role to a member

post.description: Remove a role assignment from a workspace member.
post.summary: Remove a role from a member

delete.description: Delete a custom role. System roles cannot be deleted.

patch.description: Update name, description, or permissions of a custom role.

admin.AuthResponse.description: Full auth response after MFA verification

admin.InviteAdminRequest.description: Invite a new platform admin (SUPER_ADMIN only)

admin.LoginRequest.description: Admin login with email and password

admin.LoginResponse.description: Response after password verification. If MFA enabled, requires second step.

access_token.description: Only set if MFA is not enabled (first login, needs setup)

admin.MFASetupConfirmRequest.description: Confirm MFA setup by providing the first TOTP code from authenticator app

admin.MFASetupResponse.description: MFA setup response with QR code URL and secret

admin.MFAVerifyRequest.description: Verify TOTP code after password authentication

auth.AuthResponse.description: Authentication response with access token and user info. Refresh token is set as HttpOnly cookie.

auth.LoginOTPRequest.description: Login with WhatsApp number and OTP code

auth.RegisterRequest.description: Registration request body. Either email or whatsapp is required. Password is always required.

auth.RegisterResponse.description: Registration response with user info and verification message

message.example: Registration successful. Please verify your account.

auth.RequestOTPRequest.description: Request an OTP code to be sent via WhatsApp

billing.CreatePaymentRequest.description: Initiate payment for a subscription invoice

entity.CreateEntityRequest.description: Create a new entity (personal or business)

plan.SetFeatureRequest.description: Set a feature permission on a plan. Use value_bool for boolean features, value_int for quotas (-1 = unlimited).

subscription.SubscribeRequest.description: Subscribe a workspace to a plan

workspace.AcceptInviteRequest.description: Accept a workspace invite using the token

workspace.AddCounterpartyRequest.description: Add a counterparty (customer/vendor) to workspace. Creates shadow entity if needed.

nama_utama.description: If entity_id is nil, create shadow entity from these fields:

workspace.AssignRoleRequest.description: Assign a role to a workspace member

workspace.CreateInviteRequest.description: Invite a user to the workspace via email

workspace.CreateRoleRequest.description: Create a custom role for the workspace

workspace.CreateWorkspaceRequest.description: Create a workspace from an existing entity

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
